Jetpack Cat

A fearless feline pilot equipped with Brigitte’s latest jet-propulsion invention, Jetpack Cat brings adorable aerial support to the battlefield.

Support

Tactician

Watchpoint: Gibraltar

Unknown

Abilities

Biotic PawjectilesFrenetic FlightLifelinePurrCatnapper

Biotic Pawjectiles

Mid-range projectile spread that heals allies and damages enemies.

Frenetic Flight

Accelerate in your movement direction. Fuel recovery is slower while carrying another player.

Lifeline

Toggle into transport mode, allowing an ally to be towed. Increases movement speed and heals your ally.

Purr

Pulsing area heal that increases in frequency over time. Knockback nearby enemies when activated.

Catnapper

Dive towards a ground location, knocking down enemies and tethering the nearest one to you.

Keys displayed are defaults for PC. They are configurable in game.

Perks

Unlock mid-match upgrades to outsmart, outplay, and dominate the fight. As the action heats up, choose game-changing abilities to amplify your Hero’s power and evolve your strategy in real time.

Minor Perk

(Level 2)

Ulterior Motive

15% of Biotic Pawjectiles healing recovers fuel.

Transport Shielding

Gain up to 50 extra shield health while carrying another hero.

Major Perk

(Level 3)

Headbutt

Frenetic Flight can knockback an enemy when flying fast enough, dealing 50 damage on impact.

Claws Out

Quick melee becomes empowered every 6 seconds, wounding enemies for 40 damage and slowing them by 30% for 1 second.

Keys displayed are defaults for PC. They are configurable in game.

Stadium Powers

Stadium Powers are ability-changing upgrades obtainable in the Armory. Each hero has 12 unique Powers to choose from.

Territorial

Enemies within your Purr take damage equal to 30% of its healing.

Purr-sistence

Purr persists 15% longer for each ally or enemy currently affected by Purr, up to 75%. Amount of healing pulses resets every 4 pulses.

Battle Fur-mation

Lifeline can tether to 1 additional ally.

Tow-Beans

When you release a target from Lifeline or Catnapper, gain 20% fuel. ­ Restore 1% fuel for every 7.5 Ability Damage dealt.

Frenzy

Ability: Your next Quick Melee slows and deals 40 damage over 3s and increases Quick Melee Attack Speed by 100% for 1s. ­ (8s Cooldown).

Zoomies

After activating Frenetic Flight for 0.5s, next time you collide with an enemy, explode for up to 120 damage and restore up to 40% fuel based on distance travelled. ­ (1.5s Cooldown).

Lindholm Inspiration

When Purr ends, all other allies within Purr's radius gain Overhealth equal to 30% of damage dealt during Purr and 10% to yourself for 3s.

Tomcat Reserves

While Frenetic Flight is active, Purr refreshes 40% faster and all other abilities refresh 80% faster.

Ambidex-fur-ous

While Purr is active, shoot both guns. The bonus shot has 35% effectiveness.

Bell Bomb

Ability: Lifeline tethers an explosive Toy Ball, that explodes for up to 120 damage on impact. ­ (6s Cooldown).

Scratch-ageddon

+25% Starting Ultimate Charge.­ Catnapper scratches all nearby enemies on impact, slowing them and dealing 150 damage over 3s.

Bouncing Biscuits

When hitting an ally with Biotic Pawjectiles, it bounces to 1 nearby ally within 15m at 50% effectiveness.

Territorial

Enemies within your Purr take damage equal to 30% of its healing.

Purr-sistence

Purr persists 15% longer for each ally or enemy currently affected by Purr, up to 75%. Amount of healing pulses resets every 4 pulses.

Battle Fur-mation

Lifeline can tether to 1 additional ally.

Tow-Beans

When you release a target from Lifeline or Catnapper, gain 20% fuel. ­ Restore 1% fuel for every 7.5 Ability Damage dealt.

Frenzy

Ability: Your next Quick Melee slows and deals 40 damage over 3s and increases Quick Melee Attack Speed by 100% for 1s. ­ (8s Cooldown).

Zoomies

After activating Frenetic Flight for 0.5s, next time you collide with an enemy, explode for up to 120 damage and restore up to 40% fuel based on distance travelled. ­ (1.5s Cooldown).

Lindholm Inspiration

When Purr ends, all other allies within Purr's radius gain Overhealth equal to 30% of damage dealt during Purr and 10% to yourself for 3s.

Tomcat Reserves

While Frenetic Flight is active, Purr refreshes 40% faster and all other abilities refresh 80% faster.

Ambidex-fur-ous

While Purr is active, shoot both guns. The bonus shot has 35% effectiveness.

Bell Bomb

Ability: Lifeline tethers an explosive Toy Ball, that explodes for up to 120 damage on impact. ­ (6s Cooldown).

Scratch-ageddon

+25% Starting Ultimate Charge.­ Catnapper scratches all nearby enemies on impact, slowing them and dealing 150 damage over 3s.

Bouncing Biscuits

When hitting an ally with Biotic Pawjectiles, it bounces to 1 nearby ally within 15m at 50% effectiveness.

More on Stadium

Story

A stray cat mysteriously turned up at Watchpoint: Gibraltar, and resident feline fanatic Brigitte was eager to adopt her. Since her early days, Brigitte has been using her cats as workshop assistants, imagining them in outlandish situations. But when Talon attacked Gibraltar, those farfetched dreams became a possible saving grace. Brigitte constructed a jetpack that would allow the cat to fly into battle and lend a helping paw to any teammates in need.

YOUNG KITTY

GOOD KITTY

SMART KITTY

One day, Brigitte discovered a lone cat wandering around the Watchpoint: Gibraltar landing bay. With no clues about the kitty’s owner, she decided to take her in, naming her “Fika” in honor of her Kanelbullar coloring and endless appetite for treats. In her downtime, Brigitte imagined fitting her new feline friend with a jetpack—a silly dream she’d had since she was young.

When Talon launched their attack on Gibraltar, Brigitte thought it best to put the project aside. But soon, she realized that if Overwatch was to stand a fighting chance against this new enemy, they'd need all the help they could get. With enough resources and a good reason, Brigitte finally realized her childhood dreams and constructed a jetpack fit for little Fika.

Now, she's as much a contributor to Overwatch as any other—and all for the better, considering the trials against Talon lying ahead. Of course, getting Sojourn to approve a jetpack wielding cat for use in the field is sure to be an uphill battle, but Brigitte has a few ideas (and a lot of data) to help let this cat out of the bag.
